name: windows-npm-runner
description: Lightweight Electron app to run npm scripts in Git Bash with full terminal output

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n VITE,TW,ELECTRON -c cyan,magenta,yellow "bun run dev:renderer" "bun run tailwind:watch" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron . --dev"
scripts.build:mac: bun run build:renderer && node scripts/build-icon.js && electron-packager . windows-npm-runner --platform=darwin --arch=arm64,x64 --icon=assets/icon.icns --out=dist --overwrite --prune=true "--ignore=^/dist[^-]" --ignore=^/src --ignore=^/scripts --ignore=/\.cursor --ignore=/\.vscode --ignore=/\.claude "--ignore=^/tailwind-src\.css$" "--ignore=^/tailwind\.css$" "--ignore=^/svelte\.config" "--ignore=^/vite\.config" "--ignore=^/bun\.lock$" "--ignore=^/index\.html$" "--ignore=^/assets/icon-square" "--ignore=^/assets/icon-concept" "--ignore=^/assets/icon-1024"
